productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Solid White Shirts
description: Composition White full sleeves shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, has dobby weaving in black thread on the front, a full length buttoned placket and a curved hemline Fitting Slim Wash care Machine/hand wash in cold water at 30 C with mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron Formal clothes don't have to be boring! Make your weekdays fun by wearing this formal shirt from indigo nation. The shirt looks fresh and crisp and will keep you cool all day long. Pair it with well-fitting formal trousers and a pair of leather shoes to take the office by storm! Model statistics The model wears size 40 in shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
